title: SongGenerationJob
description: Queue message body for the pgmq `song_generation_jobs` queue. Producer: Next.js API (`POST /api/songs`). Consumer: `services/dgx-worker`. See ADR 0007 (trace_id) and ADR 0008 (attempt_id, retries).

song_document_id.description: primary key in `song_documents` table; worker fetches full doc from Supabase using this id

tier.description: used by `MusicEngine` router in Phase 12 to pick HeartMuLa vs Lyria; also enforces per-tier storage caps from ADR 0005. `developer` tier added in v1.5 (migration 0045/0046).

attempt_id.description: ADR 0008: per-attempt uuid generated by the cloud producer (first attempt) or the worker (on retry-enqueue). Used as the idempotency key on `tracks` inserts and on the corresponding `/v1/generate` call.

attempt_number.description: ADR 0008: 1 on first enqueue; incremented by the worker before re-enqueueing on retryable failure.

trace_id.description: ADR 0007: cross-service trace id assigned by the cloud API on `POST /api/songs`. Required so logs from cloud, worker, and music-inference can be joined.

top_n_candidates.description: v1.4 Sprint 16: number of alternate renders the worker should produce. The RLHF reranker flips `is_current=true` on the highest-scoring candidate; the others remain reachable for the compare page.
